name: Sentiment Analysis
description: Analyze text to determine the emotional tone behind it. Accurately detect positive, negative, and neutral sentiments, along with detailed emotion confidence scores (joy, anger, sadness, fear, surprise).
shortDesc: Detect emotions and sentiment in text content instantly
howItWorks: Send the text payload via POST request
Our ML model analyzes the syntax, context, and vocabulary
The model assigns a general sentiment category (positive, negative, neutral)
Detailed emotion probability scores are calculated
Structured JSON data is returned for your application
